title: OMB M-21-31 Executive Logging Maturity Overview
description: Executive overview of OMB M-21-31 logging maturity using Datadog pipeline-based classification. All logs are enriched with an OMB object (category/domain/EL tier) and four log-based metrics (omb.m2131.el0.count–omb.m2131.el3.count) quantify maturity distribution over time.

definition.content:
## Executive Summary
This dashboard reports OMB M-21-31 logging maturity (EL0–EL3) using the Datadog OMB classification pipeline. Counts come from the four log-based tier metrics (omb.m2131.el0–el3 counts).

**Note:** These toplists require the OMB pipeline to emit a tag (or metric group-by) named `omb_source` that mirrors the log `source`. If not present, group by `{source}` after creating a metric tag from `source`.

definition.title: Undefined Sources By OMB Domain & Category
Retained Logs per Domain, Category, & Source
